Outcome Timeframe: Malaria infection incidence - community coverage of the intervention ≥80% in person years
Study results and measurements: Rate ratio 0.67 (CI 95% 0.56 -0.81) Based on data from 2,878 participants in 2 studies. (Randomized controlled)
Summary: Spatial emanators decreases malaria infection incidence where community coverage of the intervention ≥80%

Outcome Timeframe: Malaria infection incidence - community coverage of the intervention <80% in person years

Summary: Spatial emanators may slightly increase malaria infection incidence when community coverage of the intervention <80%
